Lung Cancer Genetic Tests

Lung Cancer Genetic Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are lung cancer genetic tests? 
If you have lung cancer , your health care provider may order genetic tests . These tests look for changes in the genes of the cancer cells in your body. Gene changes are also called gene variants or mutations . There are many types of gene changes that are found in lung cancer. Knowing what type of gene change yo
